name: univeros/filesystem
description: Flysystem v3 wrapper offering one swap-friendly API for local, S3, SFTP, FTP, and Dropbox storage, wired to the Altair container.

suggest.league/flysystem-aws-s3-v3: Allows you to use S3 storage with AWS SDK v3
suggest.league/flysystem-sftp-v3: Allows you to use SFTP server storage via phpseclib v3
suggest.league/flysystem-ftp: Allows you to use FTP storage
suggest.spatie/flysystem-dropbox: Allows you to use Dropbox storage
